word: H3670 - כָּנַף - kânaph - kaw-naf' - Be removed

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּנף

Transliteration: kânaph

Phonetic: kaw-naf'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Niphal) to be put or thrust in or into a corner, be hidden from view, be cornered, be thrust aside

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1003

Part(s) of speech: Verb
